en: its end tell me all right then who's hiding them okay I'll tell you do you
ko: 좋아 그럼 누가 숨기고 있지? 알았어 말할게

vi: Het roi noi di, ai dang giau ho? Duoc toi se noi. Ban co biet nguoi banh khong?

en: know the muffin man the muffin man the muffin man yes I know the muffin man who
ko: 머핀맨 알아? 머핀맨? 머핀맨? 응 나 머핀맨 알아

en: lives on Drury Lane well she's married to the muffin man the muffin man she's

en: married to the muffin man my lord we found it well then what are you waiting

en: magic mirror evening mirror mirror on the wall is this not the most perfect
